metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for external model workflows: OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Google Antigravity, and isolated Claude CLI child reviews.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: OpenAI official plugin to use Codex from Claude Code for review and task delegation.

plugins.name: gemini-for-claude
plugins.description: Use Gemini CLI from Claude Code for read-only review, planning, scorecards, role-pack review teams, jobs, and opt-in stop gates.

plugins.name: antigravity-for-claude
plugins.description: Use Antigravity CLI from Claude Code for read-only review, planning, scorecards, jobs, and explicit Gemini or Claude model-provider selection.

plugins.name: claude-for-claude
plugins.description: Use Claude CLI from Claude Code for isolated read-only review, planning, scorecards, role-pack review teams, jobs, and opt-in stop gates.
